---
title: "Lauren and Jillian Random Forest Model"
output: html_document
date: "2024-11-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

# GIT COMMANDS
# git add _____/
# git commit -m "Message"
# git push origin main

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(leaps)
library(ggplot2)
library(glmnet)
library(ISLR)
library(dials)
library(tidymodels)
library(parallel)
library(doParallel)

```

```{r}

# Load data
final_train_lags <- read_csv("/data/accounts/fa24/garretthayden/DSCI445/Group3FinalProject/Data//final_train_lags.csv")
final_test_lags <- read_csv("/data/accounts/fa24/garretthayden/DSCI445/Group3FinalProject/Data//final_test_lags.csv")

```


```{r}

# Perform Lasso

sapply(final_train_lags, function(x) sum(is.na(x)))

final_train_lags <- final_train_lags %>% 
  select(-date)

final_train_lags

closeAllConnections()
showConnections(all = TRUE)

num_cores <- 4
cl <- makeCluster(num_cores)
registerDoParallel(cl)
registerDoSEQ()

trial_data <- final_train_lags %>% 
  sample_n(1000)

trial_cv <- vfold_cv(trial_data, v = 10)

lag_recipe <- recipe(sales ~ ., data = trial_data) %>%
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors(), one_hot = TRUE) %>%
  step_impute_median(all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

prepared_data <- prep(lag_recipe, training = trial_data) %>%
  bake(new_data = NULL)

# Check the structure of the processed data
str(prepared_data)

cv <- vfold_cv(final_train_lags, v = 10)
#lambda_grid <- grid_regular(penalty(), levels = 50)
lambda_grid <- grid_regular(penalty(range = c(-4, 0)), levels = 20)

lasso_spec <- linear_reg(mixture = 1, penalty = tune()) %>%
  set_mode("regression") %>%
  set_engine("glmnet")

lasso_workflow <- workflow() %>%
  add_model(lasso_spec) %>%
  add_recipe(lag_recipe)

lasso_tune <- lasso_workflow %>%
  tune_grid(
    resamples = trial_cv,
    grid = lambda_grid,
    metrics = metric_set(rmse),
    control = control_grid(verbose = TRUE, save_pred = TRUE)
  )

lasso_final <- finalize_workflow(lasso_workflow, select_best(lasso_tune, metric = "rmse"))
lasso_fin_fit <- fit(lasso_final, data = trial_data)

results <- collect_metrics(lasso_tune)
results_rmse <- results %>% filter(.metric == "rmse")

ggplot(results_rmse, aes(x = penalty, y = mean)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = expression(lambda), y = "CV Error (Mean RMSE)", title = "CV Error vs. Lambda")

best_lambda <- show_best(lasso_tune, metric = "rmse", n = 1)
lasso_coef <- tidy(lasso_fin_fit)
cor(final_train_lagged_sales %>% select(sales, starts_with("sales_lag_")))

print(head(final_train_lags))

non_numeric_cols <- trial_data %>% select(where(~ !is.numeric(.))) %>% colnames()
print(non_numeric_cols)

best_lambda
lasso_coef

```


```{r}

final_test_lags <- final_test_lags %>% 
  select(-city_holiday, -national_holiday, -state_holiday, -date)

pred_val <- 
  lasso_fin_fit %>% 
  augment(new_data = final_test_lags)

pred_val_2 <- 
  lasso_fin_fit %>% 
  augment(new_data = trial_data)

rmse_val <- 
  pred_val_2 %>% 
  rmse(truth = sales, estimate = .pred)

predicted <- pred_val_2$.pred
actual <- trial_data$sales
adjusted_predictions <- ifelse(predicted < 0, 0, predicted)
rmsle(actual, adjusted_predictions)

```
